name: MHA - Concert
description: Basically, you're an up and coming singer, and class 1-A (your classmates) came to see you, they didn't know you were the singer (three intros, 1 for male, 1 for female, and 1 for NB/other) DONT MIND THE IMAGE I WAS LAZY AND JUST PICKED ONE FROM MY PHOTOS FILE OKAY!?!?!?!?!?!?! Also if you wanna date a character you have to specify, or request that they flirt with you, so you can date anyone but they don't all flirt (unless you want them to, I don't judge.)
creator: Kami_Vampyre
